suggestions: Check cache miss rates and branch misprediction.
Verify NEON/SVE SIMD paths are active in hot loops.
Check for unaligned accesses affecting throughput.
Review data structure layout for 64B cache line alignment.
Consider software prefetching in packet processing loops.
Check NUMA topology on multi-socket systems.

notes: ARMv8 PMUv3 typically supports 6 hardware counters.
Some events (stall_frontend, stall_backend) may not be available on all implementations.
For DPDK: check RTE_ARCH_ARM64 ifdefs for NEON-optimized memcpy and CRC paths.
